_comment: ADOPTER EXAMPLE (rc.11 · WS1) — the immutable release subject: the binding root the release lane seals against. source.commit is the real released commit (== manifest.release_commit); artifact.digest is the built image digest (== the provenance.json subject digest), so release-attestation-check can bind source → artifact → evidence by one shared digest. Mounts at docs/governance/release-subject.json. In CI it is generated by the trusted build job, never hand-written.
